威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾格雷諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn於大約1224年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn29歲，母親Alswn verch Maredudd16歲。他和Gwenvyr verch Phillip至少有3個兒子。他去世於1316年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾格雷諾享年93歲。

威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾格雷諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn于大约1224年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，他的父亲Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn29岁，母亲Alswn verch Maredudd16岁。他和Gwenvyr verch Phillip至少有3个儿子。他去世于1316年在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾格雷諾享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn was born about 1224, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn, was 29 and his mother, Alswn verch Maredudd, was 16. He had at least 3 sons with Gwenvyr verch Phillip. He died in 1316, in Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn est né environ 1224, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alswn verch Maredudd, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Gwenvyr verch Phillip. Il est décédé en 1316, à Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn um 1224 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn 29 und seine Mutter Alswn verch Maredudd 16. Er hatte mit Gwenvyr verch Phillip mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1316 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

ht.Llwyn Melyn, Caerfyrddin, Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn è nato il circa 1224 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alswn verch Maredudd, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Gwenvyr verch Phillip. Morì nel 1316, nel Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melynが約1224年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwynは29歳，母Alswn verch Mareduddは16歳であった。彼はGwenvyr verch Phillipとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1316年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアグレグイノグで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alswn verch Maredudd(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Gwenvyr verch Phillip(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1316년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 그레그이노그에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Llwyn Melyn, Caerfyrddin, Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alswn verch Maredudd, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Gwenvyr verch Phillip. Ele faleceu em 1316, em Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn родился около 1224 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alswn verch Maredudd, 16. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Gwenvyr verch Phillip. Он умер в 1316 г. в местности грегиног, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Einion ap Llywelyn of Llwyn Melyn nació aproximadamente 1224, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alswn verch Maredudd, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Gwenvyr verch Phillip. Murió en 1316, en Gregynog, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 93 años.
